children.name:
AssertionError: decline accepted with no/blank reason (reason not enforced): absent: got 201; empty string: got 201; whitespace: got 201 — confirm with BE whether reason should be mandatory + non-empty
assert not ['absent: got 201', 'empty string: got 201', 'whitespace: got 201']

AssertionError: server returned 5xx on invalid pagination: page=0: got 500; page=-1: got 500 — bad input must not crash the endpoint (confirm with BE)
assert not ['page=0: got 500', 'page=-1: got 500']
